market_summary: Mixed regime: KLAC 76%/TSM 52%/SLV 49%/AVGO 42% composite mom lead vs SPY 9.9%/QQQ 11.8%; semis/energy/metals resilient on 1m/3m while broad benchmarks flat
Narrow leadership with stable quality (prior high ROE/OM in KLAC/TSM/AVGO/LMT); NVDA ests show continued strong FY26-28 rev/EPS growth as sector proxy
Go: hold core with intact momentum/quality edge; no-go on turnover given marginal improvement, high IT 44% and metals vol, no new thesis damage

thesis_damage_flags.why: No material news, guidance cuts or est revisions in 7d window for core holdings per tools; momentum/quality stable per arena pack

thesis: Current holdings (KLAC/TSM/AVGO/SLV) lead momentum 42-76% with relative outperformance vs SPY/QQQ; quality stable per prior ROE/OM and NVDA growth proxy
Limited tool refresh confirms no thesis damage or negative catalysts last 7d (news/estimates UNKNOWN for most due to data gaps); FY26-28 growth trajectory intact
Mixed regime rewards selective Q+M in semis/energy/metals over broad benchmarks per pack; edge marginal vs turnover on weekly cadence
risks: IT concentration 44% vulnerable to semi capex pause or cycle shift
Metals sleeve (GLD+SLV 23%) carries high vol (36-57%) and drawdowns (SLV -42%) amid macro uncertainty
Execution/liquidity risk on paper weekly rebalance with only marginal incremental alpha
falsifiable_checks: Any core holding 30d mom <15% or underperforms SPY by >5% over next 14d
Material negative guidance, est cut >5%, or quality deterioration in next reports
trade_of_the_day.why_now: Base: mixed regime favors existing resilient leaders with stable fundamentals and momentum; bull: continued semis/energy/metals strength; bear: equity or commodity shock; current edge too marginal to justify turnover today.

constraints_check.notes: Mom scores KLAC/TSM/AVGO/SLV 42-76 lead (vs SPY 10); quality stable-high (prior ROE 35-95%, OM 12-54%); risk: IT 44%<80%, metals 23%, crypto 0; stress: equity shock ~-12%, comm shock ~-9%; exec: hold efficient, monitor wkly; kill: 2+ holdings mom<15% or est cuts>5%
